SilkPageDocumentation
default.url
Prev  1.4. General Parameters  Next

Name

default.url — Your Website URL.

Synopsis

    default.url=URL

Description

Your Website URL. Defaults to the site.id that you provide when running SilkPage with scratch target.

Prev  Up  Next
default.temp.dir  Home  2. $SITE_HOME/src/css/siteid.css
